## Checklist

- [ ] `./build.ps1 -Device <device>` compiles with no errors
- [ ] `./build.ps1 -Export` builds the store package for all manifest devices
- [ ] Verified the change in the Connect IQ simulator
- [ ] Pet state still saves/loads correctly (no broken persistence)
- [ ] Re-ran `python tools/copy_ciq_resources.py` if any sprite art changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this is a user-facing change
